MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/Dismissal on file. Proceedings reported by: Patrick Heard, CSR# 11055. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Frank D'Alfonsi (759.7410) for defendant and responding party
Lawrence Sussman of Sheppard Rosen Law Firm (296.0900 x25) for plaintiff and moving party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JEAN FUKUNAGA'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is granted. No opposition filed. Order submitted for the Court's consideration. Mr. D'Alfonsi requested to be relieved as counsel for defendant and was directed to file a noticed motion. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Set For Trial On Feb-23-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Feb-11-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 606
